page_metadata.biotools__summary: Deepred-Mt is a novel method to predict C-to-U editing sites in angiosperm mitochondrial RNA. Given an RNA sequence consisting of a central cytidine flanked by 20 nucleotides on each side, Deepred-Mt scores if the central cytidine is edited.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Deepred-Mt is a novel method to predict C-to-U editing sites in angiosperm mitochondrial RNA. Given an RNA sequence consisting of a central cytidine flanked by 20 nucleotides on each side, Deepred-Mt scores if the central cytidine is edited.
